calculation,metric definition	First Inspection Column
First Inspection Pass Rate
The First Inspection Pass Rate uses F_FIRST_INSPECTION to determine which coils pass the first inspection.

configuration,grade definition	Lab Report Configuration
Level Names Field
lab_report_config contains F_LEVEL_NAMES that specifies which grades (e.g., 'A') are considered passing for the First Inspection Pass Rate.

alternative metric,misconception	A Grade Coil Weight
Labeling Column
A Grade Coil Weight is derived from F_LABELING and is often mistakenly equated with the First Inspection Pass Rate, but it is actually the quality grade distribution.

data attribute,table column	F_PROD_DATE
Lab Intermediate Data
lab_intermediate_data contains the F_PROD_DATE column used for date filtering.

calculation,weight aggregation	First Inspection Pass Rate
Single Coil Weight
The First Inspection Pass Rate uses F_SINGLE_COIL_WEIGHT to compute the sum of passing coil weights and total coil weights.

common misunderstanding,distinction	First Inspection Column
Labeling Column
F_FIRST_INSPECTION is not equal to F_LABELING; the latter is used for final grade distribution, not the first inspection pass rate.

calculation basis,data source	First Inspection Pass Rate
Lab Intermediate Data
The First Inspection Pass Rate is calculated from the lab_intermediate_data table.

data quality,filtering	Delete Mark
First Inspection Pass Rate
The calculation of First Inspection Pass Rate excludes records where F_DeleteMark is not NULL or 0, to filter out soft-deleted data.

calculation method,implementation	First Inspection Pass Rate
SQL Query
The SQL Query implements the calculation of the First Inspection Pass Rate using the defined formula.

distinction,misconception	A Grade Coil Weight
First Inspection Pass Rate
The First Inspection Pass Rate is distinct from the A-grade coil weight ratio based on F_LABELING; the latter is a quality grade distribution, not the pass rate.

business meaning,distinction	F_FIRST_INSPECTION
F_LABELING
F_FIRST_INSPECTION and F_LABELING have completely different business meanings: one reflects production process quality, the other final shipment grade, and they cannot be used interchangeably.

calculation,metric	F_FIRST_INSPECTION
First Inspection Pass Rate
F_FIRST_INSPECTION data is used to calculate the First Inspection Pass Rate.

quality control,sequential process	Reinspection
Rework
Rework is followed by Reinspection to determine the final grade.

determines,grade	F_LABELING
Final Shipment Grade
F_LABELING determines the final shipment grade of the product.

indicator,unchangeable	F_FIRST_INSPECTION
Production Process
F_FIRST_INSPECTION is an indicator of the production process quality and is unchangeable after inspection.

grade change,upgrade	F_LABELING
Rework
Rework can upgrade the grade recorded in F_LABELING.

analysis,usage	F_FIRST_INSPECTION
Nonconformity Reason Analysis
F_FIRST_INSPECTION data is used for Nonconformity Reason Analysis.

affects,grade	F_LABELING
